title: urochloa glumaris
intro: Urochloa glumaris, also known as signal grass or signal grassy weed, is a perennial grass that is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems. Urochloa glumaris can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
